mapper.sql: id, user_id, `year_month`, `year`, total_hours, total_salary, record_count, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO monthly_summary (user_id, `year_month`, `year`, total_hours, total_salary, record_count, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{yearMonth}, #{year}, #{totalHours}, #{totalSalary}, #{recordCount}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT FROM monthly_summary WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND `year` = #{year} ORDER BY `year_month` DESC
SELECT DISTINCT `year` FROM monthly_summary WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY `year` DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM monthly_summary WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND `year_month` = #{yearMonth}
